title: Intensely Springy German Pork Dumplings
description: A traditional German dish featuring fatty and springy minced pork dumplings, dairy-free friendly and perfect for special occasions. This recipe showcases the richness of German cuisine with a delicate balance of flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: minced pork
ingredients.notes: preferably with a high fat content

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the minced pork, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, black pepper, and nutmeg, and mix well with your hands until just combined.
Gradually add the flour to the pork mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Beat in the eggs until the dough is smooth and elastic.
Bring the pork broth to a boil in a large pot, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Using your hands, shape the dough into small dumplings, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Carefully add the dumplings to the simmering pork broth, making sure not to overcrowd the pot.
Cook the dumplings for 15-20 minutes, or until they float to the surface and are cooked through.
Remove the dumplings from the broth with a slotted spoon and serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
